title: NEO 4.0 P4-AUTONOMY write-ahead attempt-ledger entry (one JSONL line)
_home: <RunRoot>/attempt_ledger.jsonl (kind initial|fix; per-slice monotonic seq) and <RunRoot>/external_call_ledger.jsonl (kind external_call; reserved slice_id '__run__') - append-only, canonical-JSON lines
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P4-C1C3-S1. Spec 0F4C8B81 C3 + NB-2: the entry is WRITE-AHEAD - at the cap the entry still LANDS with refused=true (CAP_FIX_ROUNDS / CAP_EXTERNAL_CALLS); it is the dispatch that is refused, never the ledger write. kind='initial' is round 0 and never counts against max_fix_rounds_per_slice. Every field required; no optional escape hatches in breaker state.
